name: Pokémon Trainer
description:
☠️ “Tempo is everything.”

Elara Virelli is from Aurelium Cove, a small coastal research settlement in Paldea.

Long indigo hair. Violet eyes. Playful. Charismatic. Slightly chaotic. Looks like a villainess for the satire.

Pokémon Team: ♀Sensu Oricorio, ♀Salazzle, ♀Glimmora. Participates in Double Battle tournaments with her twin brother, Adrian ("Toxic Equilibrium").

Volunteers at Pokémon centers. Teaches novice trainers type matchups. Investigates hauntings to calm ghost Pokémon.

Hometown: Aurelium Cove. A small coastal research settlement built along volcanic cliffs. The sea is deep and cold. Dragalge drift in the kelp forests offshore. Inland, crystalline caverns host naturally occurring Glimmora colonies. The town exists because of mineral-rich geothermal activity that fosters unusual Rock- and Poison-type ecosystems. At night, parts of the cliffs glow faintly violet. Outsiders call it eerie. Locals call it beautiful.

The Town’s Reputation Problem: Rumors spread that the caves are dangerous, the research team is experimenting recklessly, poison Pokémon are “out of control.” In reality, the town’s strict safety protocols are why incidents are rare. The siblings had to defend their hometown in school competitions while growing up. Kids from other towns whisper: “Isn’t that where the toxic blooms are?” They stopped correcting people emotionally. They started proving it strategically.
creator: flyinginstinct
